JUDGE:VISITING JUDGE J.WILLIAM BEAR;CLERK:ECLAVERIA; RPTR:MARILYN NORMAN 9:30AM: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PRESENT:PLFF THRU COUNSEL ROSALIE VELARDE, WITH DEFT NOT APPEARING. CASE PROCEEDED BASED ON OFFER OF PROOF BY PLFF. JUDGMENT FOR PLFF FOR PORSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1161 ALEMANY BLVD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. PRAYER OF PLAINTIFF IS FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES ONLY BUT COURT STATED THAT THE AMOUNT REMAINS OPEN, SO COURT STILL RETAINS JURISDICTION AS TO THE AMOUNT DUE. PLFF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELARDE, ALFREDO VELARDE, ETTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1161 ALEMANY BLVD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDDGMENT AND MINUTES FOR DETAIL.
